action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score 0.5777, success_rate=87.3%, room=82%, tunnel=88%, outdoor=92%. Local test shows 90%/100%/90% success. The gap between local and eval suggests harder maps in eval set. Analysis: Key improvements needed: 1) Better stuck recovery when utility=0 - use frontier cells from global_map to navigate, 2) Reduce travel distance by smarter node selection. The current planner uses utility/distance ratio which is good. Let me try to improve the frontier-based navigation and add a smarter 'last mile' strategy. With 5 iterations left, I'll make targeted improvements and submit eval. Decision: Improve planner with better frontier detection and navigation, submit eval.
